name: stoichiometry
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.products.every(function(p){ return p.gramsProduced == null || Number.isFinite(p.gramsProduced); })
output.ok === false || output.result.products.every(function(p){ return p.molesProduced == null || Number.isFinite(p.molesProduced); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Requires one arrow (-> / → / =) and at least one supplied reactant amount. Limiting reagent = min(moles/coeff); product masses/moles always finite. Missing-arrow / missing-amount / unknown-element fail-CLOSED with a string error. NOT assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS); pinned by server/tests/chem-lens-macros.test.js.
